code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut parsing = true
      while parsing
        if i >= n
          parsing = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(line, i)
          when Some(c)
            if c >= 48 and c <= 57
              num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
              i = i + 1
            else
              parsing = false
            end
          when None
            parsing = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ acc: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let n = acc.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match acc.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x <= v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      result = insert_sorted(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut s = ""
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        s = "#{v}"
      else
        s = "#{s} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let nums = parse_ints(line)
  let sorted = sort_list(nums)
  println(format_list(sorted))
when None
  println("")
end
